vt_requirements.note: Every acceptance criterion or truth-state-advancing claim must record these four V&T fields.

title: C-RSP Build Contract — TLC Workbench Hardening + Non-Bypassable CI
goal: Require non-bypassable CI, deterministic build paths, and signed evidence for Workbench truth-state claims.
objective: Enforce deterministic installs, pinned runtime compatibility, parity and accessibility gates, lifecycle tests, signed evidence, and explicit failure reasons before any verified or validated Workbench claim is allowed.
required_outputs: Deterministic install and test command paths.
CI checks that block missing parity, accessibility, lifecycle, or evidence artifacts.
Signed evidence entries for truth-state-advancing claims.
Explicit halt output for every required CI gate failure.

acceptance_criteria.statement: CI runs all required test classes.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Workflow configuration and run evidence show unit, integration, parity, accessibility, lifecycle, and evidence checks are executed.

acceptance_criteria.statement: CI blocks merge on missing parity, accessibility, lifecycle, or evidence artifacts.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Required checks fail when one of the gate artifacts is removed or absent.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Evidence verification is automated in CI.
acceptance_criteria.verification: CI runs the evidence verification command against signed logs and publishes the result.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Truth-state-advancing claims fail if V&T is incomplete.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Validation logic or workflow checks reject incomplete V&T bundles before merge.

acceptance_criteria.statement: A reproducible local command path exists for the gated checks.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Documented local commands reproduce the same checks required by CI.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Halt conditions emit explicit failure reasons.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Failure output names the relevant halt condition and describes the missing requirement.

halt_conditions.trigger: A required CI check or test class is absent from the hardened Workbench pipeline.
halt_conditions.resolution: Restore the missing CI check and verify the pipeline enforces it.

halt_conditions.trigger: Evidence signature, Merkle verification, or chain validation fails.
halt_conditions.resolution: Repair the evidence artifacts or signing path before claiming advancement.

halt_conditions.trigger: A verified or validated claim omits one or more required V&T fields.
halt_conditions.resolution: Complete the V&T bundle and re-run the hardening checks.

halt_conditions.trigger: A required Workbench contract file is absent from the bundle or implementation context.
halt_conditions.resolution: Restore the missing contract file and re-run validation.

halt_conditions.trigger: A required lifecycle or parity end-to-end test fails.
halt_conditions.resolution: Fix the failing workflow path and re-run the end-to-end checks.

halt_conditions.trigger: Accessibility threshold checks fail or required audit artifacts are missing.
halt_conditions.resolution: Resolve the accessibility regression and restore the audit artifacts.

evidence_requirements.description: Workflow evidence showing all gated test classes run in CI and locally.
Signed evidence proving truth-state-advancing claims were verified.
